app_release_notes: v0.16.17 - Small clarifier under the Results hero metrics. When a seating depth test has run, the hero shows the SDL winner's measurements (the most-recent measurement of the final combined load = PCL-winner charge AT SDL-winner CBTO). Those numbers won't exactly match the PCL log on the same screen because they're two different test runs. The hero now shows a dim attribution line - 'measured at your seating-depth winner CBTO - may differ slightly from the powder-ladder log below' - so the mismatch is self-explanatory instead of confusing.
